Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES

Title: Establishes certification and attestation for care managers employed by care coordination organizations
Summary: Enacts "Ella's law"; requires care managers employed by or under contract with a care coordination organization to provide care management services to an individual unless such care manager has completed all training requirements.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the mental hygiene law, in relation to establishing certification and attestation for care managers employed by care coordination organizations
